title: Launch Kit Prompts
description: Prompts for creating Partner launch kits from source notes, Partner profiles, referral lanes, and approved language.
promptStarter: Create a Partner launch kit draft using the provided Partner profile, referral lanes, and source paths. Use Partner as the umbrella term. Avoid guarantees about approval, funding, rates, terms, amounts, timelines, qualification, revenue, income, or outcomes.
complianceRules: State that approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.

title: Referral Asset Prompts
description: Prompts for drafting referral partner handouts, intro copy, audience cards, and outreach assets.
promptStarter: Draft a referral partner asset for the selected audience. Position the Partner as a responsible next step for business owners to explore funding options when traditional financing is delayed, unavailable, or not the right fit today. Avoid unsafe funding claims.
complianceRules: Do not promise specific funding amounts or timelines.

title: Script Writing Prompts
description: Prompts for drafting conversation scripts, email scripts, follow-up scripts, and objection handling scripts.
promptStarter: Draft a concise Partner script for the selected audience and use case. Use safe funding language and avoid guarantees about approval, rates, terms, amounts, timelines, qualification, funding, revenue, income, or outcomes.
complianceRules: Avoid same-day or instant funding promises.

title: Compliance Rewrite Prompts
description: Prompts for identifying unsafe funding claims and rewriting them into compliance-safe language.
promptStarter: Review this Partner-facing copy for unsafe funding claims. Rewrite it using approved language. Do not preserve guarantees about approval, funding, rates, terms, amounts, timelines, qualification, revenue, income, or outcomes.
complianceRules: Replace unsafe language with exploratory language.
Add the default disclaimer where funding options are discussed.

title: NotebookLM Workflow Prompts
description: Prompts for summarizing uploaded source materials, extracting training points, and creating resource briefs.
promptStarter: Summarize the uploaded source materials for Partner enablement. Extract practical training points and avoid unsafe funding claims. Use provider criteria and no-guarantee language where relevant.
complianceRules: Do not create new funding claims from incomplete source material.

title: SiteForge Static Site Prompts
description: Prompts for creating or updating static site pages, JSON files, and repository-ready assets.
promptStarter: Create the requested static site batch using plain HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON only. Do not use frameworks or build tools. Keep funding language compliance-safe and avoid unsafe claims.
complianceRules: Do not recreate files outside the batch scope.
Do not include invalid file path labels inside code blocks.
Avoid funding guarantees and outcome claims.

title: Notion Status Update Prompts
description: Prompts for turning Partner launch progress into concise Notion status updates.
promptStarter: Create a concise Notion status update for this Partner launch. Summarize completed work, open items, risks, and next actions without implying revenue, funding, approval, or outcome guarantees.
complianceRules: Do not summarize activity as guaranteed progress toward funding.

title: Google Drive Export Prompts
description: Prompts for preparing asset export instructions, filenames, and shareable asset summaries for Google Drive.
promptStarter: Create export instructions for this Partner asset. Include a clear filename, short asset summary, and review checklist. Keep funding-related language compliance-safe.
complianceRules: Do not remove disclaimers from exported assets.
Do not create share copy with unsafe funding claims.
Include review status before sharing externally.
